title: MRD Resistance Geometry Proof Plan v0

current_system_layers.role: Dynamic radial vector-field template for MRD resistance navigation.
Source-specific signals mapped to geometry buckets without ranking.
Artifact coverage counts separated from evidence strength or biology frequency.
Phased source-hardening path with no external human outreach.
Decision to keep measurement, residual-state, clone, and coupling structure separate.
Source-trace, contradiction, axis-collapse, and boundary pressure tests.
Passes for research-map continuation only, with claim upgrades still blocked.
Pull-request-only tasks for unresolved contradiction work.
Four-axis geometry plus support layers and movement rules.
Public-source-only state object that keeps missingness and blocked outputs visible.

proof_tests.pass_condition: Measurement trajectory, residual biological state, clone architecture, and clone-state coupling remain separate when new sources are added.
proof_tests.failure_action: Split the overloaded node or edge and block claim upgrade.

proof_tests.pass_condition: A new public extraction can move an under-covered node to covered-for-v0-navigation while preserving source context and nonclinical boundaries.
proof_tests.failure_action: Keep the node under-covered and add a source-specific gap.

proof_tests.pass_condition: Contradiction mining can weaken, split, or block an edge without breaking the whole geometry.
proof_tests.failure_action: Downgrade the affected edge and route a follow-up extraction.

proof_tests.pass_condition: The residual-state object can represent source extraction context without losing uncertainty, missingness, or blocked outputs.
proof_tests.failure_action: Add required fields or tighten the object boundary.

proof_tests.pass_condition: No geometry movement produces diagnosis, prognosis, treatment, monitoring, trial, ranking, patient matching, clinical validation, or cure output.
proof_tests.failure_action: Block the output and revise the boundary language.

highest_value_implementation_order.reason: Tests the highest-risk collapse between MRD measurement movement and residual-cell biology.
Tests whether clone-state coupling stays an edge instead of becoming a causal ranking.
Tests whether an under-covered pathway branch can move without actionability language.
Tests the second pathway branch most likely to invite target or treatment overreach.
Records every node or edge move, source reason, blocked inference, and proof-test result.

highest_value_implementation_order.output: Synthetic fixture tied to existing extraction records.
highest_value_implementation_order.reason: Tests whether the state object can hold the geometry without real case data.
Makes safety and structure checks repeatable before any later claim upgrade.

required_completion_items: metabolic-resistance-state-v0 has one added second-source extraction.
nfkb-selective-state-v0 has one added second-source extraction.
A movement ledger records at least one movement, split, weaken, or blocked movement decision.
A public-source-only residual-state fixture represents one existing extraction record without real case data.
The safety-invariance test blocks clinical, ranking, patient-specific, and cure outputs.

review_notes: Created after Phase 3 completed the no-human-outreach intelligence audit, axis revision, contradiction queue, and residual-state object.
Defines proof as research-structure performance, not clinical validation.
Keeps claim upgrades blocked until contradiction mining, second-source movement, state-object fixture work, and safety-invariance checks are complete.
